Design System v0.8.0
Overview Foundations Components Themes Playground
Layout
  • App-Shell Layout-Primitive
  • Card Component
  • Divider Component
  • List-Row Component
  • Panel-List Component
  • Section Component
Form
  • Button Component
  • Checkbox + Radio Components
  • Combobox Component
  • Date-Input Component
  • Field Component
  • File-Upload Component
  • Range-Slider Component
  • Search-Input Component
  • Select Component
  • Slider Component
  • Switch Component
Feedback
  • Alert Component
  • Banner Component
  • Callout Component
  • Empty-State Component
  • Progress Component
  • Skeleton Loader
  • Spinner Component
  • Toast / Notification Component
Navigation
  • Accordion Component
  • Breadcrumbs Component
  • Nav Component
  • Pagination Component
  • Steps Component
  • Tabs Component
  • Tree Component
Overlay
  • Drawer Component
  • Modal Component
  • Popover Component
  • Tooltip Component
Data Display
  • Avatar Component
  • Avatar-Stack Component
  • Badge Component
  • Chart Container
  • CodeBlock Component
  • Funnel Component
  • Stat Component
  • Table Component
  • Tag Component
  • Timeline Component
  • Trend Component
Primitive
  • Chevron Component
Layout

App-Shell Layout-Primitive

Vollständiges Page-Grid für Dashboard- und App-Layouts: Header oben, Sidebar links, Main-Content rechts, optional Footer unten.

Pures CSS Grid, kein JS. Responsive: bei schmaler Viewport collapsed die Sidebar über den Main-Bereich (Default Breakpoint 768px). Wer eine echte mobile-Drawer-Variante braucht, kombiniert mit der Drawer- Component und togglet via JS.

Beispiele

…
…
…
…
(optional)
HTML anzeigen 
<div class="app-shell">
  <header class="app-shell__header">…</header>
  <aside  class="app-shell__sidebar">…</aside>
  <main   class="app-shell__main">…</main>
  <footer class="app-shell__footer">…</footer>     (optional)
</div>

Token-Contract

TokenStatusNotiz
--app-shell-sidebar-w Optional Sidebar-Breite (default 16rem)
--app-shell-header-h Optional Header-Höhe (default 3.5rem)
--app-shell-min-h Optional Mindesthöhe (default 100vh; für embedded

Modifier

  • .app-shell--right-sidebar — Sidebar rechts statt links
  • .app-shell--no-header — ohne Header (z.B. embedded-Shell)
Source-CSS ansehen
